meanings.general_upright: The The Fool card represents new beginnings, freedom, and innocence. This is an excellent time to embrace positive changes and trust the journey ahead.
meanings.general_reversed: When reversed, the The Fool indicates recklessness or foolishness. You might be facing risk; take a patient look back and avoid impulsive actions.
meanings.love_upright: In love and relationships, the The Fool brings the energy of new beginnings and freedom. If you are in a couple, both of you are moving towards a strong bond of innocence. If single, a promising new relationship is opening up.
meanings.love_reversed: When reversed, the The Fool advises you to be careful with recklessness or feelings of foolishness in love. Take care to prevent risk from causing misunderstandings or unnecessary rifts.
meanings.career_upright: In terms of career, the The Fool signals new beginnings and opens up opportunities for freedom. Confidently harness your ability for innocence to achieve your professional goals.
meanings.career_reversed: When reversed, this card warns of recklessness or foolishness in work. Avoid making risky investment decisions or face risk with careful preparation.
meanings.money_upright: Your finances are showing a trend of new beginnings with opportunities for freedom. Managing your budget wisely and investing in innocence will bring stable financial results.
meanings.money_reversed: Financial warnings suggest you might encounter recklessness or foolishness. It is advisable to tighten your purse strings and guard against risk draining your budget.
meanings.family_upright: Your family life is peaceful, filled with new beginnings and freedom. Bond and shared innocence are key to connecting all family members.
meanings.family_reversed: Family relationships may experience recklessness or disagreements about foolishness. Patient dialogue is needed to release accumulated risk.
meanings.feelings_upright: Your or your partner's emotions at this time represent new beginnings, full of freedom and eagerly looking forward to innocence.
meanings.feelings_reversed: Emotions are somewhat characterized by recklessness or foolishness. There is some risk preventing the mindset from being truly comfortable and open.
meanings.action_upright: Action advice: Confidently take steps towards new beginnings, seize freedom, and proactively promote the flow of innocence.
meanings.action_reversed: Reversed advice: Pause to resolve recklessness, carefully examine the foolishness, and avoid making hasty moves due to risk.

meanings.general_upright: The Ten of Wands card represents completion, legacy, and harmony. This is an excellent time to embrace positive changes and trust the journey ahead.
meanings.general_reversed: When reversed, the Ten of Wands indicates disharmony or broken dreams. You might be facing loss; take a patient look back and avoid impulsive actions.
meanings.love_upright: In love and relationships, the Ten of Wands brings the energy of completion and legacy. If you are in a couple, both of you are moving towards a strong bond of harmony. If single, a promising new relationship is opening up.
meanings.love_reversed: When reversed, the Ten of Wands advises you to be careful with disharmony or feelings of broken dreams in love. Take care to prevent loss from causing misunderstandings or unnecessary rifts.
meanings.career_upright: In terms of career, the Ten of Wands signals completion and opens up opportunities for legacy. Confidently harness your ability for harmony to achieve your professional goals.
meanings.career_reversed: When reversed, this card warns of disharmony or broken dreams in work. Avoid making risky investment decisions or face loss with careful preparation.
meanings.money_upright: Your finances are showing a trend of completion with opportunities for legacy. Managing your budget wisely and investing in harmony will bring stable financial results.
meanings.money_reversed: Financial warnings suggest you might encounter disharmony or broken dreams. It is advisable to tighten your purse strings and guard against loss draining your budget.
meanings.family_upright: Your family life is peaceful, filled with completion and legacy. Bond and shared harmony are key to connecting all family members.
meanings.family_reversed: Family relationships may experience disharmony or disagreements about broken dreams. Patient dialogue is needed to release accumulated loss.
meanings.feelings_upright: Your or your partner's emotions at this time represent completion, full of legacy and eagerly looking forward to harmony.
meanings.feelings_reversed: Emotions are somewhat characterized by disharmony or broken dreams. There is some loss preventing the mindset from being truly comfortable and open.
meanings.action_upright: Action advice: Confidently take steps towards completion, seize legacy, and proactively promote the flow of harmony.
meanings.action_reversed: Reversed advice: Pause to resolve disharmony, carefully examine the broken dreams, and avoid making hasty moves due to loss.
